channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Election Commission schedules West Bengal assembly polls in two phases for convenience and security
item.description: The Election Commission of India has announced that the West Bengal assembly elections will be conducted in two phases on April 23 and April 29, 2026, instead of the earlier eight-phase polling system...

item.title: Tanzania–Kenya border demarcation reaches 75% as countries strengthen cooperation
item.description: The Parliamentary Standing Committee on Lands, Natural Resources and Tourism of Tanzania has shown satisfaction with the progress of demarcating the international border with Kenya. So far, 564 kilome...

item.title: Truck Loses Control, Rams into Commercial Bus on Lekki-Epe Expressway, Killing Four and Injuring Four Others
item.description: Four passengers don die and four others sustain serious injury for one fresh road accident wey happen along Lekki–Epe Expressway for Lagos. Lagos State Traffic Management Authority (LASTMA) confirm th...

item.title: Amit Shah Predicts Strong Mandate for BJP in Assam Assembly Elections
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah, during a two-day visit to Assam, addressed a gathering of BJP youth workers in Guwahati, asserting that the BJP-led Himanta Biswa Sarma government is likely to secure a ...

item.title: Ramaphosa backs EFF proposal to insource state services and expand clinic hours
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has publicly expressed support for the Economic Freedom Fighters’ (EFF) proposal to halt the outsourcing of certain government services, including cleaning, gardening, securi...

item.title: Parliamentary inquiry seeks answers from Peter Dutton on Brethren involvement in federal election
item.description: The parliamentary electoral matters committee is investigating the involvement of the Plymouth Brethren Christian Church in the recent federal election, amid reports of aggressive and intimidating con...

item.title: President Zardari holds talks with MQM-P, Naqvi to strengthen political stability in Karachi
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari on Sunday met with Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi and MQM-P convener Khalid Maqbool Siddiqui in Karachi to discuss national unity and political harmony. According to the Pre...

item.title: Spanish Government Accused of Organizing 'No to War' Protests to Undermine Anti-NATO Demonstration in Madrid
item.description: The article, written by Ángeles Maestro and published on March 15, 2026, criticizes the Spanish PSOE-led government and its allies for allegedly orchestrating a last-minute 'No a la guerra' protest in...

item.title: Government to collaborate with religious institutions for peace, morals, and regional development
item.description: Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba announced that the Tanzanian government will continue to collaborate with religious institutions across the country to maintain peace, strengthen moral values, and su...

item.title: How School Subjects Influence Political Beliefs from Youth to Adulthood
item.description: The article explores a new study showing that the subjects young people choose to study at school can influence their political preferences later in life. Researchers found that the link between educa...

item.title: Formula One suspends Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix amid escalating Middle East tensions
item.description: Formula One has announced the cancellation of the Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix, both originally set for April 2026, due to the worsening conflict in the Middle East. The decision, made jointl...

item.title: F1 Cancels Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix Due to Ongoing Middle East Conflict
item.description: Formula 1 don cancel the 2026 Bahrain Grand Prix and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix because of serious security concerns wey dey come from the ongoing tensions and conflict for Middle East. The FIA, wey be ...

item.title: UDA holds grassroots elections in 18 counties despite low voter turnout and technical challenges
item.description: President William Ruto's United Democratic Alliance (UDA) conducted grassroots elections across 18 counties on Saturday, aiming to strengthen its party structures ahead of the 2027 General Election. T...

item.title: Canada and Nordic Nations Discuss Arctic Security Amid Rising Geopolitical Tensions
item.description: Leaders from Canada and the five Nordic countries convened in Oslo for a mini-summit focused on Arctic security and defence cooperation, amid growing international tensions. The summit follows a major...

item.title: Large Trial Shows High-Dose Vitamin D Does Not Reduce COVID-19 Severity but Suggests Potential Benefit Against Long COVID
item.description: A major randomized controlled trial called the VIVID Trial, conducted by researchers at Mass General Brigham, investigated the effects of high-dose vitamin D3 supplementation on COVID-19 outcomes. The...

item.title: Nigeria D’Tigress Come From Behind To Beat Philippines 101-84 In FIBA Qualifier
item.description: D’Tigress, Naija women basketball team, don show serious spirit as dem beat Philippines 101-84 for Group A match of 2026 FIBA Women’s Basketball World Cup Qualifying Tournament wey dey hold for Villeu...

item.title: Opposition raises concerns over Election Commission’s impartiality before assembly election dates announcement
item.description: The Election Commission of India is set to announce the schedule for the upcoming assembly elections in Assam, Kerala, Puducherry, Tamil Nadu, and West Bengal. These states’ assembly terms are ending ...

item.title: Omotola Confirms She and Genevieve Still Dey Friends
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress, Omotola Jalade Ekeinde don clear air about her relationship with fellow actress, Genevieve Nnaji. Some people dey believe say dem no dey on good terms again, especially as d...

item.title: Feminism's Ongoing Struggle and Achievements
item.description: Feminism is far from finished, despite frequent claims of its demise. Rebecca Solnit emphasises that declaring feminism dead is based on unrealistic expectations and selective measures of success, suc...

item.title: Ontario Mayor Orders Removal of Two Tigers from Residential Property
item.description: In Wainfleet, Ontario, the owner of two sub-adult tigers has been ordered to remove them from his residential property. Zohaib Masood had kept the tigers on a former mushroom farm since last fall and ...
